properties.name: traceflow.capture-http-body
properties.description: Whether to automatically capture HTTP request/response bodies.

properties.name: traceflow.collector-url
properties.description: TraceFlow collector base URL. Default: http://localhost:4317

properties.name: traceflow.enabled
properties.description: Master switch. Set to false to disable all instrumentation.

properties.name: traceflow.redact-sensitive-fields
properties.description: Whether to redact sensitive fields from logs.

properties.name: traceflow.service-name
properties.description: Service name override. Defaults to spring.application.name.
